build.beforeDevCommand: if exist package.json (pnpm --dir . run dev:desktop) else if exist apps\package.json (pnpm --dir apps run dev:desktop) else if exist ..\package.json (pnpm --dir .. run dev:desktop) else (echo apps/package.json not found from cwd: %cd% & exit /b 1)
build.beforeBuildCommand: if exist package.json (pnpm --dir . run build:desktop) else if exist apps\package.json (pnpm --dir apps run build:desktop) else if exist ..\package.json (pnpm --dir .. run build:desktop) else (echo apps/package.json not found from cwd: %cd% & exit /b 1)

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
